articles.title: 'Police brutally attacked' truck carrying Prakash Raj, Shabana Azmi: CJP
articles.description: The Cockroach Janta Party alleges police brutality during a recent Parliament march.  Protesters claim public figures were assaulted and dragged from a truck.  One activist's wife reportedly had her hair pulled during the police action.  The group states their volunteer suffered shattered ribs and other injuries.  They demand the resignation of Dharmendra Pradhan and government dialogue.

articles.title: Kerala merchant navy man dies in Russian strike off Ukraine ahead of wedding
articles.description: A 26-year-old merchant navy officer from Kerala died after his ship was hit. The cargo vessel was reportedly struck by Russian forces near Odesa. Akhil Joyan was due to marry in two months and was the sole provider. His family is seeking assistance to bring his body home. India condemned the attack on commercial shipping and civilian lives.

articles.title: Method over madness: How Spain's collective brilliance conquered the world
articles.description: Spain secured their World Cup title with a late extra-time goal from Ferran Torres.  This victory mirrored Andres Iniesta's decisive strike from sixteen years prior.  Argentina's performance lacked intensity and suffered from disciplinary issues throughout the match.  Spain's methodical and dynamic play contrasted sharply with Argentina's struggles.  The event concluded with a poignant moment between Lionel Messi and Lamine Yamal.

articles.title: Pentagon is angry with top exec of Altman's OpenAI, calls him 'supreme village idiot'
articles.description: A dispute arose between Trump administration officials and an OpenAI executive. Dean W. Ball suggested spreading FUD regarding Chinese AI models. Pentagon official Emil Michael criticized Ball's strategy as "village idiot" thinking. Michael stated restrictions were legally enacted for national security. The exchange highlights differing views on AI regulation and national security.

articles.title: Who is Jelicia Westhoff? Maduka Okoye’s baby mama accuses Nigerian goalkeeper of cheating and abuse amid Cardi B rumours
articles.description: Jelicia Westhoff has found herself in the spotlight after making a series of serious claims against Maduka Okoye. Her posts appeared shortly after the Nigerian goalkeeper was linked to Cardi B following public sightings in Italy. Here's a closer look at who Westhoff is, her relationship with Okoye, and what led to the latest controversy.

articles.title: Mediators propose 10-day truce to revive interim deal: Iran official
articles.description: Iran received a 10-day ceasefire proposal from mediators to end the ongoing conflict. US strikes on Iranian cities continued for a ninth consecutive night. Iran's Revolutionary Guards attacked US military assets across the region. Two oil tankers exploded after attempting to transit the Strait of Hormuz. A vessel was struck by an unknown projectile off Oman's coast.

articles.title: Have demanded extradition of Hasina aide from India: Bangladesh minister
articles.description: Bangladesh has requested India to extradite former minister Asaduzzaman Khan Kamal. He fled the country amid the "2024 uprising" against the government. Kamal was sentenced to death for crimes against humanity by a tribunal. Dhaka also expects India to respond to extradition requests for other fugitives. The government stated that Hasina would face legal consequences if she surrenders.

articles.title: Who is TheMightyBA? Ludwig remains hopeful despite Streamer University 2026 controversy
articles.description: TheMightyBA came under fire after his interaction with MeesterKeem at Streamer University 2026. Despite the backlash, Ludwig said he does not believe the 19-year-old creator’s career is over. He said people can change over time and used IShowSpeed as an example of someone who successfully rebuilt his public image through growth and consistency.

articles.title: NSE’s Ahimsa index targets cruelty-free investing
articles.description: NSE Indices has launched the Nifty 500 Ahimsa Index for investors. This new gauge includes companies that do not harm animals in their business. The index aligns with non-violence principles and excludes certain firms. It aims to redirect capital towards compassionate and cruelty-free investing. This initiative offers ethical investors clearer alternatives for their portfolios.

articles.title: Ex-tech execs’ startups find favour with VCs, says report
articles.description: Startups founded by former tech professionals are attracting venture capital investment. These operator-led ventures, though few, are securing a growing share of funding. They consistently receive larger funding rounds and higher valuations compared to others. Experienced founders bring valuable company-building skills and execution focus to their new companies. This trend indicates a shift in investor confidence towards seasoned industry professionals.

articles.title: Hyundai lays groundwork for mass-market EV launch
articles.description: Hyundai Motor India is expanding charging infrastructure and component localization. The company plans to launch its first mass-market electric SUV this fiscal year. This move targets the affordable, sub-Rs 15 lakh segment of the EV market. Hyundai has previously focused on premium electric vehicle offerings in India. The new SUV launch will precede the CAFE III emission norms implementation.

articles.title: Stocks, rupee slide as oil spike fuels pressure
articles.description: Indian markets closed lower as fluctuating crude prices and global risk-off cues weighed. Banking stocks led the decline after mixed earnings reports from major lenders. The rupee weakened against the dollar due to rising oil prices and geopolitical tensions. Crude prices rose to a one-month high amid fears of supply disruption. Geopolitical tensions in West Asia are expected to persist in the near term.

articles.title: ODI tickets worth Rs 52.36 lakh went unsold: Khanna
articles.description: "Tickets worth Rupees 52,36,000 were unsold. Why all the tickets were not sold-out? DDCA started online ticket sale quite late that too without proper advertisement," Khanna claimed in a media release.

articles.title: IBPS PO Recruitment 2026 application closes today for 7,365 posts; complete registration here
articles.description: IBPS PO Recruitment 2026: Today, July 21, 2026, is the last date to apply online for IBPS PO Recruitment 2026, which offers 7,365 Probationary Officer and Management Trainee vacancies in participating public sector banks. Eligible graduates aged 20 to 30 years can complete registration and fee payment through the official website before the deadline. The selection process includes Preliminary and Main examinations, Personality Test, Interview, Document Verification and, where applicable, a Medical Examination.

articles.title: PNB LBO Recruitment 2026: Applications for 545 Local Bank Officer posts begin at pnb.bank.in; check eligibility and selection process
articles.description: PNB LBO Recruitment 2026: Punjab National Bank (PNB) has started the online application process for 545 Local Bank Officer (LBO) posts under Junior Management Grade Scale-I. Eligible graduates with one year of banking experience and proficiency in the relevant local language can apply between July 20, 2026 and August 09, 2026. The recruitment process includes a written examination, document screening, Local Language Proficiency Test, interview and document verification. Selected candidates will be appointed in their applied state.

articles.title: MMU ET 2026 results released as online counselling and seat allotment process set to begin
articles.description: MMU ET 2026 result: Marwar Medical University has declared the MMU ET 2026 result for candidates who appeared in the entrance examination on July 3, 2026. Scorecards are available through the official candidate portal. Online counselling, including choice filling and seat allotment, will begin in the fourth week of July. The admission schedule, registration trends, attendance figures, score benchmarks and university admission framework have also been released for candidates preparing for the next stage.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Keanu Reeves
articles.description: In 'Destination Wedding', Keanu Reeves imparts a profound piece of advice about how the misbehavior of others can actually save you precious time and effort. His journey began with a love for hockey and extensive travels, which led him to discover his passion for acting. With a career that flourished over decades, Reeves has achieved remarkable success in the film industry.

articles.title: Amid Sonam Wangchuk row, Aamir's 3 Idiots set for re-release
articles.description: Aamir Khan's '3 Idiots' will re-release in theatres on September 4, 2026, as part of NH Studioz's acquisition of the Vidhu Vinod Chopra Films catalogue. The film has also resurfaced due to speculation linking Rancho to Sonam Wangchuk, a theory Aamir denied at a BFI Q&A while expressing concern for Wangchuk's health.

articles.description: The new glimpse for 'Jana Nayagan' features Vijay in a Chief Minister look. This visual has significantly increased fan anticipation for the film's upcoming release. articles.description: Avengers: Doomsday advance tickets for premium screenings sold out quickly. The film's early ticket sales surpassed other major releases.
